entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop used in the study to detect canopy water stress.

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: An abiotic stress condition that affects plant canopy reflectance and is detected using HSI.

entities.name: PLANT PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The assessment of genotypes under field conditions to evaluate traits.

entities.name: UAV BASED SENSING
entities.description: Sensing using Unmanned Aerial Vehicles to accelerate the phenotyping process.

entities.name: HYPERSPECTRAL IMAGING
entities.description: A sensing technique using HSI sensors to acquire rich spectral information for stress detection.

entities.name: MACHINE LEARNING BASED FEATURE SELECTION
entities.description: Methods used to identify the most sensitive wavebands for water stress detection.

entities.name: RECURSIVE FEATURE ELIMINATION
entities.description: A specific feature selection method that outperformed others in selecting the best band subset.

entities.name: SUPPORT VECTOR MACHINE
entities.description: A classifier used for feature selection and classifying water stress levels.

entities.name: WAVEBANDS
entities.description: Specific spectral ranges sensitive to canopy water stress.

entities.name: CANOPY REFLECTANCE
entities.description: The reflection of light from the plant canopy, which changes due to drought.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS ADAPTATION
entities.description: A complex trait involving the plant's ability to adapt to conditions like drought.
